name: llm-guard-kit
summary: v0.46.0: MechanismFeatureExtractor — 12 text-level signals (sem_sim, certainty, hedge, lexical overlap, polarity, TTR, numeric/entity density, context sim) + 3 Phase B SC signals. Phase A: 4/5 datasets gate PASS (halueval2_qa AUROC=0.964, summary=0.787, dialogue=0.702, truthfulqa=0.668). Bootstrap CI, stratified CV, cross-dataset transfer test. Phase B: f13-f15 + code execution oracle.
author: Avighan Majumder
